name: San Francisco Seafood Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the mussels and remove any beards. Shell and devein the shrimp.
2. Cut the fish into 2-inch chunks.
3. Cook onion and garlic in salad oil until tender.
4. Stir in tomatoes with their liquid, clam juice, tomato paste, wine, and seasonings; heat to boiling.
5. Pour the tomato mixture into a 3-quart casserole dish.
6. Add fish chunks, mussels, and shrimp.
7. Cover the casserole and bake for 20-25 minutes until the fish flakes easily, mussels open, and shrimp are tender.
8. Sprinkle with parsley.
